headline: Is It Time To Reassess Booking Holdings (BKNG) After This Year’s Share Price Slump?
summary: Wondering whether Booking Holdings at US$159.68 is starting to look like value, or if the stock still has work to do before it is priced attractively. The share price has risen 3.4% over the past week, but is down 16.3% over the last 30 days and has declined 25.0% year to date and 24.7% over the past year, even though the 3 year and 5 year returns stand at 56.6% and 74.2% respectively. Recent coverage has focused on Booking Holdings as a large online travel platform that remains closely...

headline: Will GE Vernova, MercadoLibre, or NVR Be the Next Big Stock Split?
summary: Wall Street is rediscovering the stock split playbook. In May 2026, KLA (NASDAQ: KLAC) announced a 10-for-1 forward stock split alongside a fiscal Q3 earnings beat and a roughly 21% dividend hike, with shares trading in the $1,800 range. Earlier this year, Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) completed a 25-for-1 split announced in February 2026, bringing ... Will GE Vernova, MercadoLibre, or NVR Be the Next Big Stock Split?

headline: Late bookings and different destinations: travel impact of Iran war
summary: CNBC's Karen Tso takes a look at how the turmoil in the Middle East is affecting the global travel industry ahead of the crucial summer holiday season.
